headline: Ingersoll Rand to Participate in Upcoming Investor Conference
summary: DAVIDSON, N.C., May 28, 2026--Ingersoll Rand Inc. (NYSE: IR), a global provider of mission-critical flow creation and life science and industrial solutions, announced that Vik Kini, chief financial officer, will participate in a fireside chat at the Wells Fargo 16th Annual Industrials & Materials Conference on Wednesday, June 10, at 3:15 p.m. ET.
